personal.name: Kareem Safwat
personal.title: Senior Quantity Surveyor
personal.summary: Senior Quantity Surveyor with 9+ years of experience. RICS APC Candidate. Expert in tendering, procurement, and strategic cost management. Also an AI Vibe Coder and Agentic Software Developer leveraging Anthropic's Claude to automate complex workflows and build scalable full-stack web apps.
personal.professionalStatement: I bridge the critical gap between on-site construction realities and financial constraints, ensuring projects are delivered on budget without compromising quality. I also utilize AI Vibe Coding and Agentic Software Development to build intelligent, scalable full-stack applications.

experience.title: Senior Tendering & Procurement Engineer
responsibilities: Lead the preparation and issuance of tender packages and analyze requirements for compliance
Prepare accurate cost estimations and evaluate submitted bids
Coordinate significantly with internal departments including Engineering, Project Management, and Finance
Manage supplier relationships, including identification, evaluation, and negotiation of terms and contracts
Oversee procurement of materials and services focusing on quality compliance and cost savings

experience.title: Team Leader (Cost Estimation & Tendering)
responsibilities: Led a team to prepare accurate cost estimates and winning tender submissions for large-scale projects
Developed cost estimation models reducing error margins by 20%
Secured contracts worth over $10 million by delivering precise, competitive tenders

experience.title: Commercial Engineer
responsibilities: Managed full tender process and pricing strategies using CCS Candy
Administered construction contracts, tracking milestones, payments, and claims
Performed detailed quantity surveying and prepared Bills of Quantities (BOQs)

experience.title: Tendering Engineer
responsibilities: Utilized CCS Candy for comprehensive tender preparation, cost estimation, and resource planning
Employed PlanSwift for accurate quantity takeoffs from project documents
Managed bid submissions and supplier evaluation using BidBow

experience.title: Quantity Surveyor Engineer
responsibilities: Prepared cost estimates, feasibility studies, and managed tender documentation
Monitored project costs, tracked changes, and managed valuations and payments
Analyzed financial performance and reported on project profitability

experience.title: Site Engineer
responsibilities: Constructed four sewage treatment plants and tanks in Golden Coast
Managed structural and architectural modifications for City Stars and Swiss Hotel blocks

education.institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport

availability.message: Let's build something exceptional together. Whether you need precise cost estimation, tendering strategy, or procurement management, I'm here to help your project succeed.
